entry.title: Re: April (Citizen) Developer Challenge – SAP Build Apps: Task 1 - S/4HANA OData
entry.content:
Yes, thanks for pointing out the space. 

Here is the Hash: 78f4943b874504a536b1e7e5f7b26aef96f2982b865a8b2307dd4fabe0b038f9

entry.title: The digital skills initiative for women
entry.content:
Hi @David_Chaviano,

Thank you for the initiative. I am a 31 year old woman, originally from Afghanistan and I am the first generation who had the opportunity to get an academic education. I studied civil engineering at the university in Germany and then business administration.

 

I have been working in an SAP consulting company in HR for over three years. Here I had the opportunity to work on internal implementations - including SAP SucceccFactors EC, Recruiting, EC-Timeoff - in addition to the everyday HR topics. However, as I do not have SAP knowledge, it is difficult to retain what I have learnt and this cannot be proven by a certificate. Since the internal implementations, my interest in the SAP world has increased. The possibility of SAP Certificate is unfortunately limited as a non-consultant, so I find this a great initiative for my further development and professional career.

 

Thank you so much. 

Kind regards

Fariba

entry.title: Re: How to use an S4/Hana OData service in Analytics Designer?
entry.content:
Hi @fau 

thanks for Detailed steps, I have done a similar V4 service and while testing 
steps 1 , Get Functionality 
I am facing below error 

"code" : "/IWBEP/CM_V4_MED/241",
 "message" : "Operation import 'MATERIALUPDATE': Return of operation 'MATERIALUPDATE' is not entity type based",
  "@SAP__common.ExceptionCategory" : "Metadata_Error",

Field attributes are similar to entity type
can you suggest to fix this or suggest how was entity set and type built in this example.

 

Rgs

Jay

entry.title: Add "Start Date" & "End Date" fields in Customer Statement Form
entry.content:
Hello all, 

In "Customer Statement" form, we need to add "Start Date" and "End Date" as fields in the table that contain Open Items on the item level, and since the fields are not available in Standard form, we have to add custom fields. Can you please tell us which Business Context we have to use to add these custom fields in Customer Statement form ? Could you please tell us which is the appropriate BADI to use to determine the "Start Date" & "End Date" information ?

Many Thanks,

entry.title: Re: Revaluation values for Fixed Assets reversed when cre...
entry.content:
Use the tab "Transaction Items" to transfer the revaluation posting, for example by using an asset transaction type like 891 (Revaluation (debit) prior year).
Before doing this it would highly recommend to follow the best practise as described in the documentation, for example here or here, and to test the posting first via the manual posting to see if the desired result matches your expectations.

Transfer Legacy Assets with the SAP S/4HANA Migration Cockpit:  https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/3e5fcf2c768746049b5627bd5a42f720/178b8c335df24f78af65b96d9f1fd327.html?locale=en-US&version=2402.500#(i)-pre-test

Migration Object: Fixed asset - Postings: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/d5699934e7004d048c4801b552f3b013/3c0dddd9424549fe9c46db30780c128c.html?locale=en-US&version=2402.500#pretest

entry.title: Re: Iterating through JSONModel with multiple nested arrays
entry.content: What is the script code you are executing to test out the answer that David provided?

entry.title: Re: Set up digital signature to PDF from 'SSL server Stan...
entry.content:
Hi ,

"Have you found a solution? If so, could you please assist me as I have a similar requirement?"

"Thank you in advance."

entry.title: Badges block on People Profile Spotlight
entry.content: We do not have the Badges block configured in BCUI, yet there is a Badges block shown on the People Profile Spotlight. Is there a way for us to remove this? Since we have not used this before or done any kind of roll-out with the company, it would be confusing to end-users to see this. Thanks!

entry.title: git command to connect to BTP Destination pointing to Git repo
entry.content:
Hello experts,

How do we specify the Git destination created on BTP to corporate git repo in Git command?

For instance Destination name is "gitrepo1" which points to corporate git account for example http://github.e/8042

when we use git clone <git repo>   -- how we need to specify the destination name here in this command

 

Regards,

Abdul Hakim

entry.title: Re: April (Citizen) Developer Challenge – SAP Build Apps: Task 3
entry.content: 4190ba2b1b3214491401122bf9fcae1406fdd812c0e9c345b07cb6aac13f8446

entry.title: Re: Camera doesn't open on iPhone 13 iOS 17.4
entry.content: This is fixed now. Camera access was missing in Build Preview App.

entry.title: email providers for mail-test purpose during implementations or tests
entry.content:
This is a short Success-Hack to make testing and implementation easier. 

When testing is very common to create emails only with the purpose of checking the UI, links, text, etc.

For the above, is possible to create temporal emails very fast and with no password required. Below my favorite providers.

 

Müllmail.comhttps://muellmail.com/en
Mailinatorhttps://www.mailinator.com/
Dispostablehttps://www.dispostable.com/
Yopmailhttps://yopmail.com/

Hope this helps!

entry.title: Re: Check Out our Latest SAP Marketing Cloud Email Videos
entry.content: Available Now: In the video Using Conditions in Emails in Content Studio of SAP Marketing Cloud, you’ll learn how to leverage conditions to personalize your emails.

entry.title: Hide specific competencies/Skills from employee groups
entry.content:
Hi there,

We're currently in the process of building out our Talent Intelligence Hub, adding in new custom competencies and skills around certain roles.

However, we want make it that with certain roles cannot see certain competencies in their library. I've tried to dig into the reading, but it seems our only option is to make these attributes active or inactive.

Are there ways to do this at all?

Kind regards,

Antonis

entry.title: Re: Staffing" tab is not visible in Project Template in S...
entry.content:
Hi,

Found the solution for the query, it lies in the staffing type for the Role type. 

if Role type selected has the "staffing type as staffed by resource manager via authorization" then the staffing tab will be hidden.

Thanks.

entry.title: SAP Inside Track São Paulo
entry.content:
Join the SAP Inside Track Event which is back in São Paulo!

The event will take place on July 27th, starting at 8:00AM UTC and end at 18:00PM UTC.

An SAP Inside Track is a community event, open for all people from the Community (Customers, Consultants and Freelancers). No matter if you are a developer, business consultant or an architect. The event is organized by peers from the community.. and YOU are able to influence the agenda.

More information:

Language: Portuguese and English

Costs: 30 BRL - this value will be revert to non profit social organization and registration is mandatory (link will be shared soon).

Sponsored By: SAP Community, PUCSP

 

*Please note that this event entry is a summarized version of the original event and your registration may be required by the organizer shared on the original event website. RSVP accuracy here is without guarantee and does not constitute registration.

Location 

  • PUC SP - Campus Marquês de Paranaguá

Organization:

Roberta Fernandes

Edson Thomaz

Marssel Vilaça

João Secco

 

Social Media:

More information  will be publish in our media, please follow  @sitbrazil

Use #sitsaopaulo hashtag, use @_sitsp for mentioning us.

entry.title: Re: Business Volume Report shows Billing Documents that d...
entry.content:
Hi @gvictor and ygongalov,

I validated your comments, and the observations are listed below with some examples:

1. The billing documents are created before the Contract creation.

2. A Delta accrual was performed for the Contract.

3. The report WB2R_BVDETAIL shows the Billing document against the Settlement document.

4. The rates and volumes in the WB2R_BUSVOL still does not the rates and volumes against these.

Can you please suggest what could be missing here.

Billing Document   WB2R_BVDETAIL  Contract Details  WB2R_BUSVOL

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to change the names of multiple business partners at once?
entry.content: Hi @wiliyaer You used #SAP HANA Cloud as the tag, which references to the database product. I assume you wanted to tag it with the #S/4HANA Cloud? That would help others to find your question.

entry.title: Re: Iterating through JSONModel with multiple nested arrays
entry.content:
Hi Ryan,

The script is ToolPage.controller.js, which controls the ToolPage.view.xml view.

Or are you looking for the exact code?  This code retrieves the data shown in Dev Tools:

const oDtdModel = new JSONModel("../../rest/catalog/PipelineService");
console.log("oDtdModel: ", oDtdModel);

When I added the code that David suggested right after that, I got the error.  I tried a modified version of that code but that brought back something that didn't have the oData array in it.

const oData = oDtdModel.getData();
console.log("oData: ", oData);

The oData array of the one that shows everything in Dev Tools has 30 items in it, which is what I'm trying to get to.

I hope that answered your question, Ryan.

entry.title: Re: Iterating through JSONModel with multiple nested arrays
entry.content:
Hi Ron,

Change the following (it will only work if that is how you are already retrieving your model successfully) :

const oDtdModel = new JSONModel("../../rest/catalog/PipelineService");
console.log("oDtdModel: ", oDtdModel);

To:

const oDtdModel = new JSONModel("../../rest/catalog/PipelineService").getData();
console.log("oDtdModel: ", oDtdModel);

 

 

 

 

 

Regards,

Ryan Crosby

entry.title: Re: SAP Community - Where are you from?
entry.content: Welcome @karolduster - we are looking forward to consuming your content. Great to have you here. 😊

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere Replication Flow Partition Issue
entry.content:
Hello @Laxmi5 ,

Try setting "Replication Thread Limit" at both Source and Target to 1. Please note that this will impact performance of initial load(Takes longer to complete) as parallel threads are decreased to 1.

entry.title: Re: Excel connection to SAP failed after GUI 8.00 Update
entry.content:
Perhaps some component was missing during the installation or the ADDON is not active...
https://answers.microsoft.com/en-us/msoffice/forum/all/activating-an-inactive-excel-add-in/a8af5ad0-6c41-4f67-986f-352dd4a23a3f

entry.title: SAC Measure input control doesn't work
entry.content:
Hi SAC Experts,

In a SAC story, I tried to create input control based on the calculated measure. 

This measure appeared in the list of available measures 

but didn't filter the table (I wanted only lines with 1 to be present).

The measure calculation refers to the Date dimension. The Date dimension is set up to show unbooked values, nevertheless, the filter didn't work either with booked dates or unbooked ones. 

In addition, another measure above - Age - is also a calculated measure, but it didn't even appear in the list of available ones for the filter.

Please, could you advise what could be the reason for this and how to make things work?

 

Thank you,

Yuri

entry.title: Re - create bill of exchange presentation
entry.content:
Dear All,

our client issued BoE with Manage automatic payments APP and then made the presentation (BoE Presentation APP) but there was an error and no presentation documents were posted. We went into the batch input session and created documents manually but they are not related to the issued documents.

How can we do for linking boe presentation documents with issued documents?

 

Thanks for any help.

Kind Regards.

Gloria

entry.title: Re: Ho to show/hide buttons and table controllers based on conditions set in the groovy script?
entry.content:
Hello,

On the same context, how to hide 'add', 'delete' and 'Select All'  buttons on specific condtions on the Table Controler  (form.getTableController) using the groovy code?

Thank you

entry.title: Re: Workflow Email notification in CP
entry.content:
Hi dear college,

I recommend to explore some BadI that could cover this scenario, reach out more info in the link below.

SAP Business Accelerator Hub

 

Regards

Julio C.

entry.title: Re: Time off replication in H4S4 - available enhancements?
entry.content:
Hi,

I know the option to replicate SSFF EC time-off to S4, but why you need a B2B replication?

Check this:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_SUCCESSFACTORS_EMPLOYEE_CENTRAL_INTEGRATION_TO_SAP_BUSINESS_SUITE/546df659463448bcb577237c44756109/00b15561429a43a1ba979bec50403dc7.html

Regards,

entry.title: Re: Welcome all SAP Community members, start here!
entry.content: Hi community, I´m very happy to be here.

entry.title: Re: What is the preferred way of data fetch from HANA vie...
entry.content: External view would be the easiest option . I do not think creating native SQL is recommended rather use ADBC but why do over-engineering when external views are there.

entry.title: Re: Time off replication in H4S4 - available enhancements?
entry.content:
Hi,

The link you provided is essentially what we currently use, except we are using CPI as the middle ware.

What I am trying to establish is, when we activate H4S4 does that facilitate additional functionality in terms of replicating absences. For example are there any BADIs available.

Regards

Brendan

entry.title: Re: Where is the "follow user" option in the new Community?
entry.content:
Hi I use a workaround for that (via RSS feed, but hopefully the follow function will be brought back soon...):

1. go to users: https://community.sap.com/t5/forums/searchpage/tab/user 

2. search for the user, you would like to follow

3. klick on respective users posts:

4. klick on "Options" -> "subscribe to RSS":

5. use the feed URL for your RSS reader:

entry.title: SKU for Additional Storage File System
entry.content:
Hi, We need to add another File System to the App Server with the pourpose to save some documents that can be exported from SAP. 

Wich SKU we need to use?

8008798

SAP Addit Storage 

8011367 SAP Additional DbaseStorage Priv cld ed

 

Thanks

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Process Automation: issue with Actions Proj...
entry.content: Hi @davide_bramati , did you find any solution?

entry.title: Lowest SAP ECC version that can be integrated with SAP BTP through Cloud Connector
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Is there a reference webpage that outlines the lowest SAP ECC version that can integrated with SAP BTP through SAP Cloud Connector? I could search the SAP application help page for SAP Cloud Connector, but it only outlines the OS and the CPU that are supported.

My client is on SAP ECC 6.0 EHP6 and wants to integrate with SAP BTP. Is this version supported for integration with BTP?

Thanks

entry.title: AI Core - on-premise Git support
entry.content:
Any idea when AI Core will support connecting to on-premise Git server via SAP Cloud Connector (like it is supported by SAP Data Intelligence) ?
The official roadmap is quite empty https://roadmaps.sap.com/board?PRODUCT=73554900100800003641&range=CURRENT-LAST#Q2%202024

entry.title: Re: Time Sheet Workflow Based on Time Valuation Results
entry.content:
Hi ,

 

I configured the rule , but it is not working for me.

What can be the reason?

 

BR,

Nevena

entry.title: Re: Where is the "follow user" option in the new Community?
entry.content:
Hello @Xenia thanks for the Workaround steps.

a)Could you please explain the step5 with some more details ? Once we get the URL ? what are the next steps ? can you please add the steps with screenshots ?

b) Also , if any new content gets added , will that work ? or we get notifications for only existing contents of that user?

entry.title: LLAMA3 70B programming in ABAP
entry.content:
Hi Community,

At the end of last week, Meta released the long-awaited Large Language Model - LLAMA3. What is unusual about it? The fact that it's open source and really delivers. For now we got the 8B and 70B versions, but 400B is also in the preparation. In my opinion, this is a big deal. And how is it doing in SAP's backyard? I won't reveal - see for yourself.

entry.title: Re: How to Create Application Job in SAP ABAP Cloud ?
entry.content:
Hello, 

please use appropriate SAP Managed Tags - such as "ABAP Development and "ABAP RESTful application programming model" - when creating questions or blog posts. 

You may have a look at this blog post by Andre Fischer:
https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/how-to-schedule-application-jobs-from-a-rap-based-business-object/ba-p/13553507 

Kind regards,
Carine

entry.title: Curriculum Status direct link
entry.content:
Hello, 

 

We would like to understand if it is possible to generate a direct link to address the Users directly into the Curriculum Status screen. 

Under the Direct Links tool, we can see that it's possible to have direct links for several purposes (Learning History, Registrations, Learning Assignments,..) however we couldn't find a way to generate a direct link for the Users "Curriculum Status" screen. 

Is this something that it's possible to generate? 
 
Thank you very much!

entry.title: Re: Step by step for Setting up the Cost Center Replication from S/4HANA to SAP SuccessFactors Emplo
entry.content:
@SyambabuAllu 

Is MDI mandatory? What if we choose stay with IDoc based replication? Is that an option? I do not see a need to use MDI just for Cost Center replication.

Thanks,

Vijay

entry.title: Re: Quantidades das quotização negativa
entry.content:
Hi dear college,

If you are facing a DUMP I strongly recommend to create a ticket for this error.

Best Regards,

Julio C.

entry.title: SAP IBP - Is it possible to send Analytics details (Charts) via email using daily job?
entry.content:
Hello all,

Do we have an option to send Analytics details (Charts) via email using daily background job in IBP?

Sarang Kulkarni

entry.title: Re: SAP BPA - Error in executing the action in Process flow
entry.content: Hi Archana, if I will raise the ticket for trial account, will I get any support?

entry.title: Re: Does having many replication flows increase compute/s...
entry.content:
Hi @bhat_vaidya2 ,

It's an interesting question. I'm not sure about regarding compute/storage costs but there is a really great blog post, check out Replication Flow Blog Series Part 4 - Sizing by @DanielIngenhaag 

Regards,
Tuncay

entry.title: Sales Organizational Structure - Ad Service Industry
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have a question about the Sales Organizational Structure for Service industry.

Customer is an Ad service company who reach customers via Instagram, Facebook. Also, they say have 500+ dispensaries. They couldn't understand the SAP terms how more specific we explain.

Could somebody give examples how this Sales Organizational Structure works for a Ad service company?

How to explain them to make this understand.

SAP S/4HANA SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud SAP S/4HANA Cloud for Sales SD (Sales and Distribution) 

Thanks!

entry.title: Re: List with 9 SAP S/4 HANA Fiori Apps for Analysis and Reports | SALES (SD)
entry.content:
@Uday1 Below is the answer I got for my question about reports.

It is recommended to create custom reports based on cds views.

Kindly check if cds views below could fulfill your requirements:

I_SalesDocItemPricingElement (https://api.sap.com/cdsviews/I_SALESDOCITEMPRICINGELEMENT)

I_InventoryPriceByKeyDate(https://api.sap.com/cdsviews/I_INVENTORYPRICEBYKEYDATE)

Also cds views for Sales for your reference:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/c0c54048d35849128be8e872df5bea6d/87fae757dc3bf032e1000000...

Hope it helps!

Thanks!

entry.title: Re: Iterating through JSONModel with multiple nested arrays
entry.content:
So here's something odd.  When I use const oDataArray = oDrdModel.oData, I then created an IF statement checking whether oDataArray is an array or not using Array.isArray() and, for whatever reason, it says that it isn't an array.

That has me stumped.  I can see that it's an array.

entry.title: Re: DRC NFS-e Outbound Utilizando Partner Enablement no SAP Public Cloud | Prefeituras
entry.content: Top demais!! Parabens pelo post!

entry.title: Re: Derive Week Range based on Date (SAC Model)
entry.content: Hi Venkat, I tried this in new model, it did work but when I upload new data from flat file. For all the new tranformations it is asking for source column to map Please suggest how to move ahead here, Its not allowing to load the data

entry.title: Re: CAP authentication
entry.content:
Technically speaking, CAP typically relies on approuter/xsuaa instances to oversee authentication. That's maybe most common but that's not an absolute. 

Assuming that your CAP application deployment is front-ended by approuter, you should have a look at this post by Marius Obert,  I haven't used this in a while, but I expect the mechanism still works. Marius writes up an important caveat on the technique -- it will not work universally -- so read carefully.

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud, add-in for Microsoft Excel and SAP Datasphere connection
entry.content:
Hi @alexander_peter,

Thanks for the heads up regarding #SAP Datasphere and SAP Analytics Cloud, add-in for Microsoft Excel.

Is there any other official announcements and documentation for this info?

Do you mean now if customers connect SAP Datasphere tenant directly with SAP Analytics Cloud, add-in for Microsoft Excel then it requires the BI subscription for the end user though it's included SAC license already?  It's little bit confusing between Datasphere and SAP Analytics Cloud.

Appreciate more clarification.

Regards,
Tuncay

entry.title: Re: SAP Zertifizierung - Updates 2024
entry.content:
Vielen Dank fürs Teilen, Thomas!
Mit Stay Certified können u. a. Trends für 2024 wie generative künstliche Intelligenz, Cloud ERP oder Clean Core vermittelt und überprüft werden.

entry.title: Re: April (Citizen) Developer Challenge – SAP Build Apps: Task 2 - Formulas

12ccc5f06ecce7760f8e29e1fffe874a6e0b4d00ebdfa593eb9aa76a43abbcb1

tricky one!

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA migration cockpit – Creating and using synonyms for renaming staging tables

Cheers,

Rod

entry.title: Re: Badges block on People Profile Spotlight
entry.content:
I've been trying to find a way too in our Preview environment but I can't find any way to control which sections do and no not appear (even if they are blank). I'd encourage you to vote on my Influence request below which relates to this query:

https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/321255/?section=sectionDetails

entry.title: Re: WebEx VLS integration with SF LMS for2H 2023 release
entry.content: with this getting error- WebExRest : failed with status 400 BAD_REQUEST , Exception invalid_client -Invalid client: with message (invalid_client) Invalid client. We tried regenerating teh client id/secret but no help. Any idea what could be going worng. We have teh latest zipfile from SAP for the tempalte.

entry.title: Revision level on products- different per plant ?
entry.content:
We have a need to have different revision levels for a product on plant level. How can we do that?

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Revision level on products- different per plant ?
entry.content:
The revision level for a product is it not available at plant level . 

 

Please follow the KBA 2963059 ( https://launchpad.support.sap.com/#/notes/2963059 ) and submit a feature request if you would like it added

entry.title: Is it possible to change the Comm. User ID?
entry.content:
Hi SAP support team,

Is it possible to rechange the CC ID in "Maintain communication user"?

 

Regards.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to change the Comm. User ID?
entry.content:
Dear Customer, 

 

The Communication User ID is created automatically by the system and it's not modifiable.

The same happens for Business Users ID, for example, this information is unique for each user and cannot be edited.

 

Thanks!

entry.title: Re: how to do GI in the Q stock from the upper lever WBS...
entry.content:
You need to transfer the material from one WBS stock segment to another with a 415Q movement type.

It's a transfer posting in MIGO.

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere and SAP Data Intelligence Cloud - what does this mean for me now?
entry.content: The blog contains links to the official SAP Notes regarding end of life for DI Cloud and DI on-prem. Regarding new capabilities, the roadmap explorer, also linked in the blog is the official source for any coming plans. There are a lot of capabilities coming to the solution over the coming quarters so please continue to monitor the roadmap over this time.

entry.title: WebIDE After building, code changes revert
entry.content:
I'm facing a strange issue where I'm making a small change to my Component.js file, but once I build the code is reverted back to what it was before. I've never seen this before so I've tried logging in/out, opening webIDE in incognito and clearing cache to no avail. 

Can anyone please help me on this? The code keeps reverting right after the build is completed, even when attempting to deploy.

entry.title: Select query date feild in not working
entry.content: I given greater than equal to condition in select query but still its fetching old records

entry.title: Re: Function Module for converting lower case to upper case
entry.content: thank you

entry.title: Re: Send SAPscript form PDF from output type message to Business Network
entry.content:
We are running into an issue with this BADI logic above.  We are finding that the NAST record has not been created at the point of this BADI executing.  Does anybody know what we may have done incorrectly?

Much appreciated...

entry.title: Re: WebIDE After building, code changes revert
entry.content: I found the solution. I copied the code, deleted the file I was trying to change, made a new file with the same name and put the code back in. After this, the build completed without reverting my code.

entry.title: ECTR Macro PARAMETER_MAP search for Empty
entry.content:
Hi,

is it possible to search for an empty / not filled value in a class in ECTR macro?

My idea was: 

p_classification = PARAMETER_MAP("Class1@Classtype1")
p_classification.CONFIGURATION_TYPE = ""

search1 = SEARCH("doc", p, p_classification)
resultlist1 = KEYLIST_FROM_SET(search1)


But I get all documents back and not only the ones without an entry.

I hope someone allready had this problem and can help.

entry.title: Re: Message_Type_X error when using BAPI
entry.content: There is a message sent along with the MESSAGE_TYPE_X. Check the SAP notes or contact SAP support.

entry.title: Re: Building SAP Asset Manager Client (MDK-23.8.7 & MDK Plugin SDK-2310.0.4) plugin error
entry.content: What is the nativescript version that you're using?

entry.title: Re: Welcome all SAP Community members, start here!
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

great to join and be a member in SAP Community.

Greetings Monika

entry.title: SAP IAS - Password Synchronisation with Active Directory
entry.content:
Hello all,
Is it possible to sync passwords between IAS and Active Directory? 
I have a scenario under which users can authenticate using the SPNEGO mechanism: however, in case the kerberos token is not available, they should be able to log-in via Username and Password, using the same password that they use to authenticate via AD.

I was not able to find anything in the documentation that reflects a similar scenario.

Any hint?
Best,
Roberto.

entry.title: Re: SAP Community - Where are you from?
entry.content:
Hello I´m from Essen. 

And working since many years in integration stuff.

Greetings Monika

entry.title: Re: The resource of type "Document" with identifier "Number" is not available er
entry.content: well done, that fixes my issue 🙂

entry.title: Re: Calculating Forecast using sum of previous year actua...
entry.content:
@Insan28 

It will be easier to help if you create an example in excel and show the logic clearly of what you intend to calculate. You will have to use PREVIOUS() to look back. Again easier to understand if an example was provided.

 

Nikhil

entry.title: Re: SAP Fiori for SAP S/4HANA - Transition from Standalone to Embedded Deployment in SAP S/4HANA
entry.content: If you have multiple SAP s4/hana backend systems all being accessed from the same Hub stand alone gateway FLP, how do you accomplish the same single Launchpad with the now recommended embedded approach?

entry.title: Re: Upgrade solution manager tool ST release 720 from SP...
entry.content:
Hello,
see the Blog - SAP MacGyver – Installing SAP SolMan 7.2 also for more details

best regards Roland

entry.title: Re: SAC Measure input control doesn't work
entry.content:
@ypinchuk 

If you go with measure based filter you might not able to plan in the table. Instead of measure based filter, try creating a measure based dimension using the measure values to create dimension category. Make sure you cover all possible values for the measure including null. Then you can use this dimension to filter the table.

Nikhil

entry.title: Please share the list of Business Processes in SAP PP.
entry.content: Please share the list of Business Processes in SAP PP.

entry.title: Re: Transformation issue in SAC Data Model
entry.content:
@bosingh 

Not sure what was the workflow used. But once you created the the transformation and the job, you should just edit the job and replace data source and select the new file, your transformation should remain intact.

Nikhil

entry.title: Re: SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central: 1H 2024 Release Highlights
entry.content:
Regarding

4. New Experience for People Profile

does the username / employee ID / Assignment ID is becoming a forbidden information to display ?

i’m unable to display these information in profile preview / spotlight view .

do i need to create a custom Ui to achieve these or is there some plan from SAP to either display it directly from BizX or if not possible, should I include a deeplink to IAS Employee Profile using Global USer ID ?

entry.title: Re: PAN number field is missing in Business Partner API S...
entry.content:
Hi Rajesh,

The PAN number is not currently available in the OData API for BP, you could use the.  If you would like to suggest this an a feature request on the SAP Customer influence portal please follow the steps in KBA 2838330 - How To Request for New Features for Master Data topics in SAP S/4HANA Cloud. 

Kind Regards,
Stephen

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hi @David_Chaviano 

My name is Yashobanta Satapathy. I have been working as an Assistant Professor in Production Engineering field for 7 years after completing masters in production engineering. I'm eager to explore new opportunities as an SAP Functional Consultant mainly into SAP modules like Production Planning, IBP. I have completed beginners learning journey for SAP S/4 HANA Manufacturing for public cloud. I'm eagerly looking forward for certification opportunity to enhance my skills and explore jobs in SAP. Kindly consider me under mid-life job switch category.

Thanks

entry.title: Enhance VD52, Customer material Info Records.
entry.content:

If not is there any other way to achieve where we can have a flag for customer preferred materails?

Thanks,

entry.title: Re: Introduction to Smart Data Wrangling
entry.content:
Hi Josef, thanks for the blog, i have a requirement, can we create a Calculated Column dynamic based on year, example If(Year=2024, Amount, 0), i want Year = to be Dynamic to select current year when the year changes. I couldnt find any function for year/current system date.

Please let me know if you have any idea or workaround for this.

entry.title: Re: SAC Measure input control doesn't work
entry.content: Nikhil, it's analytic table, not planning. I created a measure based dimension but it doesn't work with unbooked date members

entry.title: Re: Badi hitting twice...SCMG_BEFORE_VALID_C for Dispute Management ECC 6.0
entry.content:
I was having the same issue.

  1. BADI Implementation UDM_BEFORE_VALID_S of Definition SCMG_BEFORE_VALID_S is calling the customer implementation of Definition SCMG_BEFORE_VALID_C.  Refer to class method IF_EX_SCMG_BEFORE_VALID_S~CHANGE to see that call.
  2. The customer implementation of SCMG_BEFORE_VALID_C is then called directly on its own as you would expect.

That is how my system works for Package UDM_CASE in Software Component FSCM_CCD Release 618 SP14.

entry.title: Re: How to use aggregated value of a Z Condition Type aut...
entry.content:
Hi Abul,

Do you want to have a field amount (kbetr/ConditionRateRatio) for ZPM0 as not zero in the order? If I can see it correctly, you are already using an own Custom Logic implementation. Try to use a statement like ConditionRateValue = ConditionAmount in this implementation.

Thank you.

Kind Regards,
Iza

entry.title: Re: CAP authentication
entry.content:
In most of cases all deployed applications to SAP BTP is behind authorization. By default public access is restricted.  There are some work around if you really want to do it without authorization

Anyway could you specify the Postman method? Are you trying to reach local one or the deployed version of service/application router? If it is local I think you can try to use .http file to test your requests. you can set authorization with {{me}} Example

If you are trying to reach a deployed app/service on SAP BTP you will need to create a service key and authenticate by using OAuth 2.0. After creating the service key on SAP BTP cockpit you can read this documentation and get your Bearer token  https://learning.postman.com/docs/sending-requests/authorization/oauth-20/

entry.title: Re: ABAP Cloud Developer Trial 2022 Available Now
entry.content: Hi @julieplummer20 , thanks for sharing the great news! Kindly consider posting such news with an ABAP related tag like https://community.sap.com/t5/c-khhcw49343/ABAP+Development/pd-p/833755570260738661924709785639136. I actually missed this totally on SCN and only learned of it from social network 🙂

entry.title: SAP Support for suppliers on Ariba
entry.content: Hi! I'd like to know how can suppliers on Ariba request support from SAP. Is there any steps I can follow?

entry.title: Re: April (Citizen) Developer Challenge – SAP Build Apps: Task 0
entry.content: 95b37bbfb78cfe8359129bada7e2668b625984bec104a8cbfc372d79b7289163

entry.title: Re: SAP Support for suppliers on Ariba
entry.content:
Hi Ruisa! Thanks for sharing your question. As a supplier on Ariba, the companies can request assistance over the phone or e-mail.  They just need to follow the steps described below.

  • Access supplier.ariba.com
  • Click on the “?” icon, at the top right corner
  • Select “Support”
  • Select “Contact us”
  • Select “Register on SAP Business Network”
  • Select “Something else”
  • Select any of the options
  • Select “Create a Case”
  • Fill the form to request assistance by phone or email.

You can also check the steps described above on the blog post with screenshots or YouTube video Supplier Launchpad: Introducing the New Help Centre - YouTube.

If you need any further guidance, the Customer Interaction Center is also available 24/7 to guide customers through this process. You can find their contact information according to your country here: SAP Support Worldwide Telephone Directory.
